data.title: Stephen Klasko and Rod Hochman join AmplifyMD board and advisory team to innovate specialty care.LOS GATOS, Calif.— AmplifyMD aims to modernize specialty care delivery across health systems.
data.description: Two former CEOs from Jefferson Health and Providence have recently joined AmplifyMD in an effort to enhance specialty care delivery within health systems. The company, based in Los Gatos, California, announced this development on January 8, 2026, through a press release. AmplifyMD is an AI-enabled multispecialty virtual care platform that aims to revolutionize the way health systems expand their services.

data.title: Bass Pro Shops partners with SMX League™ for the Monster Energy SMX World Championship Final at Thunder Ridge in September.
data.description: Bass Pro Shops has been selected as the exclusive partner for all races in the SMX racing series. The Monster Energy SMX World Championship Final in September will be held at Thunder Ridge, located at Big Cedar Lodge. This announcement was made on January 9, 2026, in Anaheim, California. The partnership will span the entire SMX calendar, showcasing the Thunder Ridge venue and featuring the final championship event.

data.title: Texture and WattTime collaborate to offer real-time CO₂ emissions intel in Texture platform, aiding energy companies in operational decisions.
data.description: In an effort to provide energy services companies with valuable insights, Texture and WattTime have joined forces to integrate real-time marginal CO₂ emissions data into the Texture platform. This collaboration allows users to access emissions impact information together with normalized energy data for multiple sites, devices, and portfolios without the need for extra setup. This partnership aims to enhance awareness and decision-making by offering a comprehensive view of emissions linked to energy consumption.

data.title: CABEI's credit rating upgraded from "AA" to "AA+" by JCR, reflecting global recognition.
data.description: In TEGUCIGALPA, Honduras, on January 9, 2026, the Central American Bank for Economic Integration (CABEI) received a significant boost in its credit rating from the Japan Credit Rating Agency (JCR). The rating was upgraded from "AA" to "AA+", signaling a strong endorsement of CABEI's financial stability. This upgrade comes with a stable outlook, indicating a positive trajectory for CABEI in the foreseeable future. This move further solidifies CABEI's position as a reliable financial institution on the global stage.

data.title: Long-term Bitcoin holders sold $300B worth of BTC in 2025, signaling potential for bull run in 2026 with declining sell pressure.
data.description: In 2025, long-term holders of Bitcoin liquidated approximately $300 billion worth of BTC. However, with a decrease in this selling pressure, a positive forecast for 2026 has surfaced.

data.title: IDEXX Labs to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 2, 2026. Analyst call set for 8:30 am ET. Live webcast available.
data.description: In Westbrook, Maine, IDEXX Laboratories, Inc., a prominent player in pet healthcare advancements, will announce its Q4 and full-year financial results for 2025 on Monday, February 2, 2026, prior to the market opening. The company has organized an analyst conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. A live webcast of the call, along with a prepared remarks transcript and the Q4 2025 Earnings Snapshot, will be accessible through a provided link. IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol IDXX.

data.title: Eason Technology Limited acquired a commercial real property in Hubei through a Purchase Agreement on Dec. 16, 2025.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Eason Technology Limited revealed that it has signed a Purchase Agreement on December 16, 2025, to buy a commercial real estate property in Hubei. The company, traded as NYSE: DXF, is making a significant investment in the property, reflecting its strategic expansion plans. This move underlines Eason Technology's commitment to growth and diversification, with the transaction being a key milestone. By acquiring the property, the Company is strengthening its presence in the real estate sector while tapping into the potential opportunities for development and revenue generation in the region.

data.title: Eason Technology Limited notified by NYSE for delinquent filing of semi-annual financials on Jan 2, 2025. Stock listed as DXF.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, a tech company based in Hong Kong, Eason Technology Limited, disclosed that it was informed by NYSE Regulation on January 2, 2025, about its non-compliance with the continued listing standards of NYSE under the ticker symbol DXF.

data.title: CEO Bill Hutchinson of Dunhill Partners acquires Northpark Village Shopping Center in Lubbock, a 70,479-square-foot asset.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Dunhill Partners, Inc., a prominent player in high-performing real estate investments, revealed the acquisition of the Northpark Village Shopping Center. This significant move involves a 70,479-square-foot property that goes beyond a mere real estate deal, signaling a strategic investment by the company.

data.title: LMU CBA marks centennial year at SoFi Stadium on Jan. 4, hosted by Office Beacon, celebrating 100 years of excellence.
data.description: On January 4, 2026, Loyola Marymount University's College of Business Administration (CBA) kicked off its 100th anniversary at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles. The event, co-hosted with Office Beacon, marked the beginning of the centennial celebrations for LMU. Important figures participated in the gathering to commemorate this milestone ...

data.title: Bitcoin is showing signs of a rally in 2026, with profit-taking pressure easing and prices rebounding from $87,000 to the mid-$90,000 range. There is significant overhead supply between $92,000 and $117,000.
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is showing promising signs for a potential rally in 2026, supported by positive technical indicators and diminishing selling pressure. According to Glassnode data, the pressure to take profits has decreased significantly, enabling Bitcoin to bounce back from $87,000 to the mid-$90,000 level. This rebound indicates a decrease in selling activity, especially among long-term holders, and signifies a period of stabilization after a distribution phase observed in the fourth quarter of 2025. However, the upward momentum may encounter resistance due to significant selling pressure in the range of $92,000 to $117,000.

data.title: Controversy at Polymarket as they disregard rules on Venezuela invasion, causing backlash from traders who lost millions.
data.description: Polymarket is under scrutiny following controversial rulings on multiple markets that have resulted in significant losses for traders. One such ruling involved the Venezuela market, where Polymarket determined that the U.S. did not invade Venezuela despite a military operation that included 150 aircraft from 20 bases, resulting in 100 casualties and the removal of the country's leader. This decision contradicted the platform's own rules, which stated that a military offensive by the U.S. to establish control over any part of Venezuela would result in a "Yes" resolution. Despite President Trump's statements claiming U.S. control over Venezuela, the market initially saw a sharp increase from 2.5 cents to over 50 cents, sparking backlash from traders. This story can be found on Benzinga.com for more details.
